title: Ensure static IP tests use different IPs
body: They can run in parallel, which could flake if they both allocate the same address at the same time

Change LGTM, but the tests are falling over.
It helps when you adjust the expected values to match the changes you made. Re-pushed.
Oh, that would also work well. Avoiding hardcoded addresses for tests will definitely help.
